scope: Run Wizard v4.3 preflight and v4.2 full/auto loop on the current Codex Ratchet frontier, then route heavy work to codex2 for an independent adversarial Xi-shell coherent-information gradient audit.

wizard_v4_3_preflight.repair: Added top-level method_contracts object required by the current repo validator; patched the hermes-wizard-v4-3-object-preservation skill to include this validator requirement.
wizard_v4_3_preflight.claim_ceiling: object-preservation preflight only; no sim, physics, Axis0, gravity, flux, or formal admission claim

wizard_v4_2_loop.route_truth_boundary: The v4.2 full/auto loop was a real receipt-producing attempt, but not FULL: management/parent coverage was partial, Gemini was skipped under codex-local mode, and the auto next-task drifted toward route-truth audit. Hermes preserved the original Xi adversarial audit objective rather than letting the drift define the task.

codex2_heavy_worker.runtime_boundary: codex2 gpt-5.5 xhigh direct-build; no spawn_agent/collab/subagents/child agents; no staging/commit

formal_scout_validator_fresh_rerun.reason: The script reran cleanly, but the result intentionally records all_pass=false because adversarial controls falsified the stronger Xi shell-geometry/cut-specific reading.

parsed_result.strongest_falsifier_observed: same entanglement-angle schedule on a fixed computational basis reproduces the candidate coherent-information profile

claim_ceiling: The independent adversarial audit kills the current Xi shell-geometry/cut-specific bridge reading. It preserves that the original gradient profile exists, but shows the profile is reproduced by an entanglement-angle/lambda schedule countermodel rather than shell geometry, cut specificity, phase/twist, or chirality. No final Xi, Phi0, Axis0, gravity, physics, bridge promotion, FTL, or formal admission is admitted.
result_classification: high_rigor_closed_for_this_bounded_audit; broader Xi program remains open only after a new finite object avoids the countermodel
